ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance metric entry */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Total time taken for the response in seconds */,
  "dns_dialup" REAL /* Time taken for DNS resolution with dial-up connection in seconds */,
  "dns_time" REAL /* Time taken for DNS lookup in seconds */,
  "request_write" REAL /* Time taken to write the request in seconds */,
  "response_delay" REAL /* Delay in the response in seconds */,
  "response_read" REAL /* Time taken to read the response in seconds */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code returned by the server */,
  "offset" REAL /* Offset time for the request in seconds */,
  "request_size" REAL /* Size of the request in bytes */,
  "response_size" REAL /* Size of the response in bytes */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "request_method" TEXT /* HTTP method used */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server */,
  "server_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the server */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the server */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the server */,
  "server_type" TEXT /* Type of server (e.g., web, database) */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Last time the server was checked for performance */,
  "uptime" REAL /* Uptime of the server in hours */,
  "load_average" REAL /* Current load average of the server */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the monitoring system (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric associated with this log */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server where the metric was collected */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the performance check */,
  "client_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_logs_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_codes" (
  "status_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status code */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code returned by the server */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric where the error occurred */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Detailed error message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error was logged */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server where the error occurred */,
  "client_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
